question.text: The Financial Intelligence Unit - India (FIU-IND) was set up by the Government of India on:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** FIU-IND was set up by the Government of India vide O.M. dated 18th November 2004 as the central national agency for receiving, processing, analysing and disseminating information relating to suspect financial transactions. **The Trap:** September 18, 2013 is the PFRDA establishment date, and April 27, 2020 is the IFSCA establishment date. **Cross-Exam Context:** FIU-IND's role is tested in NISM Series III-A under AML/CFT compliance. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** FIU-IND reports directly to the Economic Intelligence Council (EIC) headed by the Finance Minister.
